api: Reply.io REST API v3 (https://api.reply.io/v3) plus legacy-observed v1 read endpoints
scope: Covers current Reply.io v3 OpenAPI GET list/detail endpoints as streams and dialect-expressible JSON/empty-body mutations as write actions, while preserving the four legacy v1 read streams emitted by the Go connector. Coming-soon, binary/multipart, root-array, required-query write, and semantic POST-body read/reporting endpoints are explicitly excluded.

excluded.reason: documented as coming soon or unstable in the current Reply API reference
